message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question" (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure"), "feedback" (text), "complies" (boolean). Evaluate the given text.

Text: "Ievads ietver trīs daļas: 1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija. 2. Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi. 3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. Ievada apjoms ir 1–2 lappuses."

Question 1: Chapters. Does the text list main sections of the thesis? It lists three parts of introduction, not the main sections of thesis. So it does not list main sections. So fails. Feedback: It only lists introduction parts, not main thesis chapters. Complies false.

Question 2: Description. Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It briefly describes the three parts of introduction. So yes, it describes each part. So complies true. Feedback: It gives brief description of each introduction part, but not of thesis chapters. So partially.

Question 3: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It only gives intro structure, not overall thesis. So no. Complies false. Feedback: Only introduction structure, not overall thesis.

Return JSON array with three objects. Ensure no extra text.
